patch.value: Ecosystem-wide PM living-context audit & forward-backlog rebuild (2026-06-07)

Manual audit + inspection of ALL 1055 pm items against the entire pm-cli ecosystem (codebase, docs, tests, telemetry, Sentry). Finding: the forward/open backlog is empty again — all 9 capability epics have only closed children, so 'pm context' returns no actionable work, violating the philosophy 'project management = context management'. This plan rebuilds a rich, well-defined, non-duplicate OPEN forward backlog under every capability epic and fills ADR gaps, executed via 5 specialized read+write audit sub-agents (disjoint epic scopes) coordinated by the orchestrator, then shipped as a PR with full AI-bot review loop and merge.

Rebuild the living forward backlog (features/stories/tasks/chores/issues/improvements/ideas/goals) + ADR gaps across all capability epics; no source/code/docs changes (tracking-only); all new backlog items OPEN; new ADRs closed Decisions with final changelog regen.

author: maintainer-agent

value.title: Audit CLI command surface & schema/config (epics pm-mpbb, pm-8jdc)
value.body: Deep-audit src/cli, command surface, completion, contracts, config/schema/governance/settings-validator vs tracked work; create OPEN forward backlog under pm-mpbb & pm-8jdc; verify pm-haak schema-leak fix is real.

message: plan add-step "Audit CLI command surface & schema/config (epics pm-mpbb, pm-8jdc)"

author: maintainer-agent

value.title: Audit MCP server + SDK/extensions/packages (epics pm-5k4v, pm-ugqx)
value.body: Deep-audit src/mcp, src/sdk/cli-contracts, src/core/extensions, src/core/packages, packages/*; create OPEN forward backlog under pm-5k4v & pm-ugqx.

message: plan add-step "Audit MCP server + SDK/extensions/packages (epics pm-5k4v, pm-ugqx)"

author: maintainer-agent

value.title: Audit storage/history + search/semantic (epics pm-o2kc, pm-ydp6)
value.body: Deep-audit src/core/store, history, item, fs, checkpoint, search, vector snapshot; create OPEN forward backlog under pm-o2kc & pm-ydp6.

message: plan add-step "Audit storage/history + search/semantic (epics pm-o2kc, pm-ydp6)"

value.title: Audit observability/telemetry/health (epic pm-5oj5)
value.body: Deep-audit src/core/telemetry, diagnostics, sentry, health/validate/stats commands + live telemetry stack + Sentry; create OPEN forward backlog under pm-5oj5.

value.title: Audit docs/onboarding/release/CI + tests/coverage (epic pm-u9d0)
value.body: Deep-audit docs/*, .github/workflows, scripts, tests/*, coverage config, release automation; create OPEN forward backlog under pm-u9d0.

author: maintainer-agent

value.title: Record ADR gaps as closed Decisions under pm-m2u1
value.body: From agent recommendations + recent decisions, record any architectural decisions not yet in the 27-ADR log; closed Decisions => regen changelog at end.

message: plan add-step "Record ADR gaps as closed Decisions under pm-m2u1"

author: maintainer-agent

value.title: Consolidate: dedupe-audit, validate, reindex, health; enrich milestone roadmap
value.body: Run pm run dedupe-audit, pm validate, pm run reindex, pm health; cancel/merge any cross-agent duplicates; enrich pm-doxj roadmap + link new sub-epics; seed release-monitoring reminder/event.

message: plan add-step "Consolidate: dedupe-audit, validate, reindex, health; enrich milestone roadmap"

author: maintainer-agent

value.title: Commit + push + open descriptively-named PR
value.body: Commit all .agents/pm additions with detailed message; push branch; open PR (specific name reflecting the audit + backlog rebuild).

message: plan add-step "Commit + push + open descriptively-named PR"

author: maintainer-agent

value.title: AI-bot review loop until zero findings
value.body: Trigger @codex review + /gemini review + @gemini-code-assist; wait; address every finding; re-trigger after each push; loop until all bots report no findings; keep all GitHub checks green.

message: plan add-step "AI-bot review loop until zero findings"

author: maintainer-agent

value.title: Merge to main + verify Sentry + telemetry real-time data
value.body: Merge PR; return to main; confirm Sentry shows recent helpful data and telemetry stack logged all actions with real-time data.

message: plan add-step "Merge to main + verify Sentry + telemetry real-time data"

value.author: maintainer-agent
value.text: Audit waves 1-5 complete: 71 OPEN backlog items created + AC backfilled + dedupe sweep clean (0 dups) + validate/health ok + 2 ADRs recorded. Proceeding to consolidation, commit, PR, bot-review loop.

patch.value: Done. audit-cli-schema-agent: 8 items under pm-mpbb/pm-8jdc + audit Story pm-srex; verified pm-haak FIXED (SettingsPersistSourceSnapshot).
Done. audit-platform-agent: 16 items under pm-5k4v/pm-ugqx + audit Story pm-b4cp; flagged MCP ping (pm-lold) + FlagDefinition list-field (pm-ltbr).
Done. audit-data-agent: 16 items under pm-o2kc/pm-ydp6 + audit Story pm-34gb; flagged gc-embeddings pending-refresh gap (pm-3b1t) + eval-harness re-file (pm-u8n5).
Done. audit-observability-agent: 10 items under pm-5oj5 + audit Story pm-lzrq; live telemetry+Sentry observed healthy; flagged retry-exhaustion visibility (pm-irc7). No secrets in items.
Done. audit-docs-tests-agent: 16 items under pm-u9d0 + audit Story pm-5dbn; flagged CodeQL float-tag (pm-ji5c) + ARCHITECTURE/docs drift.
Done. Recorded 2 ADRs: pm-7sq6 (coverage governance), pm-cc04 (agent self-repair via remediation registry). ADR log now 29.
Done. Dedupe sweep clean (0 dups); validate history_drift ok, health ok:true; AC backfilled on 66 items; milestone note + release reminder pm-7zs0 added.
